settings.question: How should I take this product?
settings.answer: Take as directed on the product label. For best results, maintain consistent daily use with warm water. Consult your physician if you have existing health conditions.

settings.question: How long before I see results?
settings.answer: Ayurvedic formulations work gradually and naturally. Most customers notice improvements within 3–4 weeks of consistent daily use. For comprehensive results, we recommend using for 8–12 weeks alongside a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.

settings.question: Are there any side effects?
settings.answer: All Hindrishi products are made with 100% natural Ayurvedic ingredients and are generally well-tolerated. If you experience any discomfort, discontinue use and consult your physician. Not recommended during pregnancy without medical advice.

settings.question: Can I take this with other medications?
settings.answer: While our products are 100% natural, if you are currently on prescription medication or have an underlying health condition, we recommend consulting your doctor before starting any new supplement.

settings.question: Is this product vegetarian?
settings.answer: Yes, all Hindrishi products are 100% vegetarian. All ingredients are plant-based. No animal-derived ingredients are used in any of our formulations.

settings.title: Pehli baar kisi product ne itni jaldi relief diya
settings.review: I was feeling very heavy after meals and had zero energy. Started taking this syrup and within 3 weeks, I'm feeling so much lighter. Digestion has improved a lot. Very happy with results.

settings.title: My doctor suggested Ayurvedic and I chose Hindrishi
settings.review: Instead of going for heavy medicines, I wanted something natural. This syrup has been amazing. No side effects, and I definitely feel the difference in my overall energy and appetite.

settings.title: Natural support that actually works
settings.review: Been using for 2 months consistently and my overall wellness has improved. No more that heavy, tired feeling. I appreciate that it's all natural herbs. Highly recommend.
